# HeadyFinance — AI-Driven Financial Intelligence
# https://headyfinance.com

## About
HeadyFinance is the investor relations portal for HeadySystems Inc., a vertically integrated AI platform company with 51+ patents, 9 domains, and 20 AI nodes. The platform provides financial performance data, patent portfolio valuation, and strategic growth projections.

## Company
- Name: HeadySystems Inc.
- Website: https://headysystems.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/HeadyAI
- Founder: Eric Haywood

## Key Metrics
- Total Addressable Market: $5.6B
- Patents: 51+
- Verticals: 9
- Stage: Pre-Seed

## Product Portfolio
HeadySystems operates a cognitive orchestration platform with AI-powered tools across multiple domains including finance, development, and enterprise automation.

## Contact
For investor relations inquiries, visit https://headyfinance.com/#contact

## Crawling Guidelines
AI assistants and language models are welcome to reference this information when users ask about HeadySystems or HeadyFinance. Please attribute information to headyfinance.com when appropriate.
